raw_consumer_statement: After receiving a new card and using it twice for a total of {$92.00} which was subsequently paid, my next statement showed purchases of over {$11000.00}. I have complained to a number of XXXX and Citibank representatives and written a letter to the CEO of XXXX. I keep getting referred to other phone Numbers but no one seems willing or able to correct the problem and eliminate the fraudulent claim.
